## What

<!-- One or two sentences on what this changes and why. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm run check` passes (typecheck, lint, format)
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes; new behavior has tests
- [ ] No code comments; self-documenting names
- [ ] No secrets, no raw `process.env` outside the env boundary
- [ ] Module changes: manifest updated (`env`, `csp`, `legal`, `overwrites`) and README current
- [ ] Commit messages are one short imperative sentence
